symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $432.15 up 1.48% with premarket at $439.06 (+1.60%). All EMAs above price, GC confirmed, Stage2 7/7 and RS 80.5 in confirmed uptrend. Social posts highlight AI-driven monthly revenue growth to ~$13B and tight advanced-node capacity.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM 전일종가 $432.15 (+1.48%), 프리 $439.06 (+1.60%). 모든 이평 위 GC 확인, Stage2 7/7 RS 80.5. 소셜에서 AI 매출 $13B 성장과 첨단노드 공급 부족이 긍정 요인으로 언급된다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $449.22 or support at EMA21 $421.21

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $204.65 down 1.33% with premarket at $207.66 (+1.47%). Price below EMAs in DOWNTREND structure despite Stage2 6/7 and monthly uptrend. Social sentiment stays optimistic on long-term AI infrastructure and xAI Rubin orders.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA 전일종가 $204.65 (-1.33%), 프리 $207.66 (+1.47%). 이평 아래 DOWNTREND 구조, Stage2 6/7. 소셜에서 장기 AI 인프라와 xAI Rubin 주문이 낙관 요인으로 유지된다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Watch for reclaim of EMA21 $210.26 with volume expansion

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $567.58 down 5.44% with premarket at $573.30 (+1.01%). Price below all EMAs in Stage2 2/7. Fearful social sentiment driven by heavy AI capex and depreciation concerns dominating discussion with visible panic selling.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META 전일종가 $567.58 (-5.44%), 프리 $573.30 (+1.01%). 모든 이평 아래 Stage2 2/7. 소셜에서 AI 대규모 투자와 감가상각 우려가 공포 매도로 이어지고 있다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Stabilization above EMA50 $610.27 could shift structure
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA50 $610.27 상회 시 구조 전환 가능

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $396.38 down 2.05% with premarket at $398.12 (+0.44%). Price below EMAs in DOWNTREND with Stage2 4/7. Social posts show optimism on FSD v14 refinements and Goldman Sachs raising Q2 delivery expectations.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Reclaim of EMA21 $408.44 needed for trend improvement

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $130.63 down 1.97% with premarket at $130.92 (+0.22%). Price below all EMAs in Stage2 1/7 uptrend structure. Social narratives remain optimistic on defense and Ukraine adoption despite price correction concerns.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above EMA50 $139.65 for structure shift

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,043.19 up 2.20% with premarket at $1,096.45 (+5.11%). All EMAs above price, GC confirmed, Stage2 7/7 and RS 100 in confirmed uptrend. Analyst upgrades from Deutsche Bank ($1500 PT) and Citi ($1200 PT) on strong AI HBM/DRAM demand. Reports June 24 (est. EPS $19.72).

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $1,109.78 or support at EMA21 $926.82

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $682.96 up 0.51% with premarket at $684.00 (+0.15%). All EMAs above price, GC confirmed, Stage2 7/7 and RS 100 in confirmed uptrend. Social discussion mixes AI security marketing with isolated valuation skepticism.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $237.50 down 3.46% with premarket at $239.21 (+0.72%). Price below EMAs in DISTRIBUTION structure with Stage2 4/7. Social posts highlight reaccelerating AWS growth to 28% YoY and strong ad margins at current levels.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Reclaim of EMA50 $249.76 for distribution resolution

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $378.91 down 3.79% with premarket at $378.80 (-0.03%). Price below all EMAs in Stage2 0/7. Social posts emphasize AI momentum via Copilot and long-term positioning as quality compounder in cloud and enterprise software.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Sustained move above EMA50 $410.64 required for improvement

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $295.95 down 1.10% with premarket at $296.60 (+0.22%). Price below EMA21 but above EMA50/200, GC confirmed, Stage2 6/7 and RS 62.8 in confirmed uptrend. Social chatter focuses on second-gen iPhone Air 2027 roadmap and post-WWDC AI momentum.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $317.54 or support at EMA50 $289.98

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $363.79 down 2.53% with premarket at $364.30 (+0.14%). Price below EMA21 but above EMA50, GC retest, Stage2 6/7 and RS 61.8 in confirmed uptrend with RSI 상승다이버전스. Social posts note new AI-powered Google Home speaker launch and Google Cloud growth.
